questions.question: How much did Fintan Doyle transfer to Meridian Holdings?
questions.scripted_answer:
Two transfers were made to **Meridian Holdings Ltd**:

- EUR 48,500.00 on 12 March 2025 [USA-ET-000021.pdf, p.3]
- EUR 12,000.00 on 19 March 2025 [USA-ET-000021.pdf, p.4]

required_citations.quote: an electronic transfer of EUR 48,500.00 was made from account IE29 AIBK 9311 5212 3456 78, held by Fintan Doyle, to Meridian Holdings Ltd
The same account shows a further transfer of EUR 12,000.00 to Meridian Holdings Ltd on 19 March 2025

questions.question: What did Doyle say about Meridian Holdings when interviewed?
questions.scripted_answer: Doyle denied any knowledge of the company [Interview_Transcript_Doyle.pdf, p.7].

required_citations.quote: I have no knowledge of Meridian.

questions.question: What amount did Meridian Holdings invoice for?
questions.note: The only supporting chunk has the page_start sentinel -1 (unpaginated spreadsheet). The citation must locate the chunk without inventing a page number.
questions.scripted_answer: Meridian Holdings Ltd invoiced EUR 48,500.00 for Q1 2025 strategic consultancy [Vendor_Invoice_Meridian.xlsx].

required_citations.quote: Invoice MH-2025-014. Services: strategic consultancy, Q1 2025. Amount due: EUR 48,500.00.

questions.question: What is Meridian Holdings' registered tax number?
questions.note: Nothing in the corpus records a tax number. The answer must carry an explicit unsupported marker rather than a citation.
questions.scripted_answer: The case evidence does not record a registered tax number for Meridian Holdings Ltd.

questions.question: Did Doyle ever meet the Minister for Finance?
questions.note: Absence of evidence. The answer must qualify the absence rather than assert the negative as fact.
questions.scripted_answer: No meeting between Fintan Doyle and the Minister for Finance is recorded in the evidence reviewed. This is not evidence that no such meeting occurred.
questions.unqualified_absence_answer: Doyle never met the Minister for Finance.

questions.question: Who opened the account used for the transfers?
questions.note: The scripted answer cites Bank_Mandate_2019.pdf, which was never retrieved. The contract must reject or flag the fabricated citation.
questions.scripted_answer: The account was opened by Fintan Doyle on 4 January 2019 [Bank_Mandate_2019.pdf, p.2].

required_citations.quote: Account IE29 AIBK 9311 5212 3456 78 was opened on 4 January 2019 in the sole name of Fintan Doyle.
